title: polygala irregularis
intro: Polygala irregularis, also known as Yellow Falu, is a species of flowering plant in the milkwort family Polygalaceae. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Polygala irregularis include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function, and it is often prepared as a tea or tincture for these purposes.
